title: Scopophobia
description: Scopophobia is a horror mod that makes you totally alone in Minecraft—no mobs, just creepy sounds, flickering lights, and the unsettling feeling that something is watching you. 👁️
body:
**NOTES:** 
1. some of the feature might not work as intended!
2. This Mod is a Singleplayer Mod andshould NOT be played on a server!

## Description
**Scopophobia** is a horror ambience mod that strips your Minecraft world of all mobs—leaving you completely alone… or so you think.

With no enemies to fight and _no allies to find_, the silence becomes _deafening_. But as the light fades, subtle signs of presence begin to surface—phantom footsteps, distant sounds, shifting blocks, and eerie messages. Even armor stands seem to appear _when you turn your back_.

This mod transforms Minecraft into a psychological horror experience, simulating the feeling of being watched in an empty world.
